name: aspire-orchestration
description: >- **WORKFLOW SKILL** — Manage Aspire AppHost lifecycle and recover from file locks, port conflicts, and orphaned processes. WHEN: "start my Aspire app", "aspire start", "aspire stop", "aspire wait", "restart the API service", "file lock error", "MSB3491", "CS2012", "port already in use", "upgrade Aspire CLI", "aspire update --self", "proxies missing in aspire ps", "--include-hidden", "aspire integration list", "aspire integration search", "default watch", "hot reload". INVOKES: aspire CLI (star
author: TimeWarpEngineering
